title: Dual Sourcing Made Easy: Distributionally Robust Optimization of Inventory Systems Under Independent Demand
abstract: A Distribution-Free Playbook for Dual Sourcing In the paper “Dual Sourcing Made Easy: Distributionally Robust Optimization of an Inventory System Under Independent Demand,” the authors study a common dual-sourcing dilemma: a low-cost supplier with a long lead time versus a faster, more expensive backup. Rather than committing to a parametric demand model, they propose a distributionally robust formulation that relies only on the demand mean and variance, while leveraging independence across periods. This yields a simple, closed-form way to set a tailored base–surge (TBS) policy: regular orders cover the predictable component of demand, and emergency orders buffer the remaining uncertainty, with inventory targets reflecting lead-time differences. The resulting policy is lightweight to calibrate, easy to deploy, and straightforward to stress test. In a field application using data from a multinational food manufacturer, the robust TBS settings improve service performance and reduce stockouts relative to the firm’s current rule and standard benchmarks, without sacrificing cost efficiency under volatility.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 双重采购简化：在独立需求下库存系统的分布鲁棒优化
abstract_cn: 一种无分布假设的双重采购策略 在论文《简化双重采购：独立需求下库存系统的分布鲁棒优化》中，作者研究了一个常见的双重采购困境：一个低成本但交货时间长的供应商与一个更快但更昂贵的备选供应商。作者提出了一种分布鲁棒的模型，而不是依赖于参数化的需求模型，该模型仅依赖于需求的均值和方差，同时利用了各个时期之间的独立性。这种方法提供了一种简单的封闭形式来设定定制的基础–激增（TBS）政策：常规订单覆盖可预测的需求部分，而紧急订单则缓冲剩余的不确定性，库存目标反映了交货时间的差异。最终的政策在校准上轻便，部署简单，并且易于进行压力测试。在一项使用跨国食品制造商数据的实地应用中，鲁棒的TBS设置相较于该公司的现行规则和标准基准，提高了服务绩效并减少了缺货情况，同时在波动性下没有牺牲成本效率。

title: From armed roots to airline routes in South America: A dual imprinting perspective
abstract: Abstract Reserch Summary We propose that founding partner relationships can leave distinct imprints on organizations that differ in durability and in how they respond to subsequent changes involving the founding partner. Examining South American airlines founded between 1919 and 1984, we argue and find that such relationships simultaneously create an internal capability imprint, enhancing operational performance and facilitating international expansion, and an external identity imprint, constraining expansion by triggering national security concerns among foreign regulators. Internal capabilities persist longer because they are embedded in organizational structures and tacit knowledge, while external identity resides in more malleable stakeholder perceptions. Post‐founding changes to the imprinter reshape these effects asymmetrically: the transition to civilian air traffic control erodes the competitive advantage of military‐derived capabilities by diffusing previously scarce expertise, while military coups intensify the negative consequences of a military‐associated identity. These findings advance a dual imprinting perspective and contribute to strategy research by explaining persistent organizational heterogeneity through founding‐era capabilities and identities. Managerial Summary When launching a venture, founders instinctively seek to collaborate with powerful partners such as celebrated investors and high‐profile board members. Those relationships leave two distinct legacies. The first is operational: the knowledge and systems a powerful partner brings embed themselves deeply, sharpening capabilities that sustain competitive advantage for years. The second is reputational: the outside world immediately begins to categorize your organization through that association, and that categorization can be hard to escape. Our research on South American airlines shows how military‐era founding partners produced operational excellence that fueled international growth, while simultaneously creating a security‐sensitive identity that blocked market access in politically sensitive contexts. The lesson for founders: think several moves ahead. The question is not solely what this partner can give us today, but how will we be seen if his or her reputation shifts tomorrow.
title_cn: 从武装根源到南美航空航线：双重印记视角
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 我们提出创始合伙人关系可以在组织中留下不同的印记，这些印记在持久性和对后续涉及创始合伙人的变化的反应上存在差异。通过研究1919年至1984年间成立的南美洲航空公司，我们认为并发现，这种关系同时创造了内部能力印记，增强了运营绩效并促进了国际扩展，以及外部身份印记，因引发外国监管机构的国家安全担忧而限制了扩展。内部能力因嵌入组织结构和隐性知识而持续时间更长，而外部身份则存在于更易变的利益相关者认知中。创始后对印记的变化不对称地重塑了这些影响：向民用空中交通管制的过渡通过扩散以前稀缺的专业知识来削弱军事来源能力的竞争优势，而军事政变则加剧了与军事相关身份的负面后果。这些发现推进了双重印记视角，并通过解释创始时代的能力和身份如何导致持久的组织异质性，为战略研究做出了贡献。 管理总结 在启动一项事业时，创始人本能地寻求与强大的合作伙伴合作，例如知名投资者和高知名度的董事会成员。这些关系留下了两种不同的遗产。第一种是操作性的：强大合作伙伴带来的知识和系统深深嵌入，提升了维持竞争优势的能力，持续多年。第二种是声誉性的：外界立即开始通过这种关联对您的组织进行分类，而这种分类往往难以逃脱。我们对南美洲航空公司的研究表明，军事时代的创始合伙人产生了促进国际增长的运营卓越，同时也创造了一个对安全敏感的身份，在政治敏感的背景下阻碍了市场准入。给创始人的教训是：要考虑几步之后的局面。问题不仅在于这个合作伙伴今天能给我们什么，而在于如果他或她的声誉明天发生变化，我们将如何被看待。

title: Where Sentence Is Served: Entrepreneurship and Socioeconomic Mobility Among Ex-Offenders
abstract: Entrepreneurship is often promoted as a pathway to upward mobility, especially for those who face barriers in traditional labor markets. However, whether and when entrepreneurship truly improves the long-term prospects of individuals with criminal records remains poorly understood. This study examines how the type of sentences—community service versus short incarceration—shapes ex-offenders’ employment routes and socioeconomic outcomes. Using three decades of Danish registry data, we compare individuals convicted of similar offenses but given different sentences and follow their trajectories over time. We find that incarceration substantially increases the likelihood that ex-offenders enter entrepreneurship as an alternative to wage work. However, this career path proves costly: compared with those who secure regular employment, individuals who pursue entrepreneurship after release earn persistently lower income and are more likely to reoffend. Mechanism analyses show that transitions into entrepreneurship concentrate among groups facing the steepest hiring barriers—foreign-born individuals, those without vocational training, residents of high-unemployment areas, and offenders convicted of property crimes or serving longer sentences—suggesting that entrepreneurship often reflects “push” rather than “pull” dynamics. Relative to unemployment, entrepreneurship is associated with modestly lower recidivism but similar income penalties. Our findings add nuance to the narrative of entrepreneurship as an emancipatory route for marginalized populations. They highlight the risks of relying on entrepreneurship as a re-integration strategy and underscore the need for organizational and policy interventions that expand access to stable jobs and provide targeted support for people with criminal records. Funding: Financial support from the Carlsberg Foundation (Carlsbergfondet) [Grant CF21-0156] is gratefully acknowledged. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19965 .
title_cn: 句子所处的位置：前科犯的创业与社会经济流动性
abstract_cn: 创业常被视为向上流动的途径，尤其是对于那些在传统劳动市场中面临障碍的人。然而，创业是否以及何时真正改善有犯罪记录的个体的长期前景仍然不甚明了。本研究探讨了不同类型的判刑——社区服务与短期监禁——如何影响前罪犯的就业路径和社会经济结果。我们利用三十年的丹麦注册数据，比较了因类似罪行被判处不同刑罚的个体，并跟踪他们的轨迹。研究发现，监禁显著增加了前罪犯选择创业作为工资工作替代方案的可能性。然而，这一职业道路代价高昂：与获得常规就业的人相比，获释后选择创业的个体收入持续较低，且更可能再次犯罪。机制分析表明，进入创业的转变主要集中在面临最严峻招聘障碍的群体中——如外籍人士、没有职业培训的人、高失业率地区的居民，以及因财产犯罪或服刑较长时间而被判刑的罪犯——这表明创业往往反映的是“推”而非“拉”的动态。相较于失业，创业与适度较低的再犯率相关，但收入惩罚相似。我们的研究为创业作为边缘化群体解放途径的叙述增添了细微差别，强调了依赖创业作为再融入策略的风险，并突显了需要通过组织和政策干预来扩大稳定就业的机会，并为有犯罪记录的人提供针对性的支持。资助：感谢卡尔斯堡基金会（Carlsbergfondet）[资助编号 CF21-0156]的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19965 获取。

title: Tax avoidance and ESG disclosure mandates: international evidence
abstract: Abstract This paper examines how regulations mandating environmental, social, and governance (ESG) disclosure affect corporate tax behavior. Using a difference-in-differences analysis on a sample of firms from 48 countries, we find that ESG disclosure mandates lead to significant reductions in tax avoidance, with stronger effects for mandates that include tax-relevant provisions. We identify increases in ESG information transparency and improvements in firms’ ESG performance as channels through which ESG disclosure mandates reduce tax avoidance. We further find that the decrease in tax avoidance following ESG disclosure mandates is more pronounced in countries with weaker financial disclosure requirements, legal and tax enforcement, and environmental and social institutions. Collectively, the evidence suggests that non-financial disclosure regulations can curb aggressive tax behavior, supporting broader goals of corporate accountability and sustainable development.
title_cn: 税收规避与环境、社会及治理（ESG）信息披露要求：国际证据
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了强制环境、社会和治理（ESG）信息披露的法规如何影响企业的税务行为。通过对来自48个国家的企业样本进行差异中的差异分析，我们发现ESG信息披露的强制要求显著减少了税收规避，且对于包含与税收相关条款的强制要求，其效果更为显著。我们识别出ESG信息透明度的提高和企业ESG绩效的改善是ESG信息披露强制要求减少税收规避的渠道。此外，我们还发现，在财务披露要求、法律和税务执行以及环境和社会制度较弱的国家，ESG信息披露强制要求后税收规避的减少更加明显。总体而言，证据表明，非财务信息披露法规能够抑制激进的税务行为，支持企业问责和可持续发展的更广泛目标。

title: Silent struggle: How older employees’ relational age and voice behavior shape co-worker trust and performance in professional teams
abstract: How do older employees maintain trust and demonstrate value in age-diverse teams where seniority does not confer authority? In flat-structured teams where members hold similar titles, younger employees may question why older colleagues have not advanced, creating status incongruence and lowering trust in their ability. Drawing on status characteristics theory, we argue that older employees’ relational age (i.e. the average age difference from their younger peers) can be negatively associated with co-worker trust and task performance. We further propose that older employees’ voice behavior mitigates the negative effects of relational age. In Study 1, using a round-robin survey design with 199 employees across 56 Taiwanese teams, we find that voice moderates the negative relationship between relational age and co-worker trust, as well as the indirect effect on supervisor-rated performance. In Study 2, a vignette experiment with 177 Australian participants, relational age reduced trust via lower perceived competence (but not warmth), and this effect was eliminated when the older worker displayed voice. Our research shows how age-based status beliefs can be challenged in professional teams, contributing to scholarship on workplace stereotyping, intragroup status hierarchies, and proactive strategies in age-diverse teams, while offering practical guidance for sustaining older employees’ careers.
title_cn: 无声的斗争：年长员工的关系年龄和表达行为如何影响专业团队中的同事信任与绩效
abstract_cn: 年长员工如何在高级性不赋予权威的年龄多样化团队中维持信任并展现价值？在结构扁平的团队中，成员拥有相似的职称，年轻员工可能会质疑年长同事为何未能晋升，从而造成地位不一致，降低对其能力的信任。基于地位特征理论，我们认为年长员工的关系年龄（即与年轻同事的平均年龄差）可能与同事信任和任务表现呈负相关。我们进一步提出，年长员工的发声行为可以减轻关系年龄的负面影响。在研究1中，通过对56个台湾团队的199名员工进行的轮回调查设计，我们发现发声行为在关系年龄与同事信任之间的负向关系中起到了调节作用，同时也影响了对主管评价绩效的间接效应。在研究2中，通过对177名澳大利亚参与者进行的情境实验，发现关系年龄通过降低感知能力（而非温暖感）来减少信任，而当年长员工表现出发声行为时，这一效应被消除。我们的研究展示了如何在专业团队中挑战基于年龄的地位信念，为职场刻板印象、组内地位等级以及在年龄多样化团队中的主动策略的学术研究做出了贡献，同时为维持年长员工的职业生涯提供了实用指导。

title: How to not change the world: Actionism and pseudo-praxis in organization and management theory
abstract: Critical research is facing calls for practical relevance through academic activism, affirmation of alternatives, collaboration with practitioners and critical performativity, with earlier traditions of critique dismissed as being negative, detached, and ineffective. This paper challenges this framing by returning to debates within Frankfurt School critical theory, particularly Theodor Adorno’s analysis of ‘thinking actionism’ – that is, a form of self-defeating critique based on a prioritization of practice, naïve optimism, faith in collectivity, and academic self-aggrandizement. Using this theoretical lens, we problematize trends within recent practice-oriented and impact-focused critical scholarship and offer three provocations. First, we caution against equating critique with practice and impact and dismissing critical theory. Second, we highlight the indirect and often unintended influence of critical theory on practice and revisit Frankfurt School approaches – such as immanent critique and negative dialectics – as theoretical resources that advance the relation between theory and practice. Finally, we evaluate examples of intellectual engagements that illustrate the potential for this more dialectical approach to politics and organizing.
title_cn: 如何不改变世界：组织与管理理论中的行动主义与伪实践
abstract_cn: 批判性研究正面临通过学术行动主义、对替代方案的肯定、与实践者的合作以及批判性表现力等方式寻求实际相关性的呼声，而早期的批判传统则被视为消极、脱离实际和无效。本文通过回归法兰克福学派批判理论中的辩论，特别是西奥多·阿多诺对“思维行动主义”的分析，挑战这种框架——即一种基于实践优先、天真的乐观、对集体的信仰和学术自我膨胀的自我挫败的批判形式。通过这一理论视角，我们对近期以实践为导向和关注影响的批判学术趋势进行了问题化，并提出了三个挑战。首先，我们警告不要将批判等同于实践和影响，也不要轻视批判理论。其次，我们强调批判理论对实践的间接和常常是意想不到的影响，并重新审视法兰克福学派的方法——如内在批判和消极辩证法——作为推进理论与实践关系的理论资源。最后，我们评估了一些知识参与的例子，这些例子展示了这种更辩证的政治和组织方法的潜力。

title: Measuring the Driving Forces of Predictive Performance: Application to Credit Scoring
abstract: Because they play an increasingly important role in determining access to credit, credit scoring models are under growing scrutiny from banking supervisors and internal model validators. These authorities need to monitor the model performance and identify its key drivers. To facilitate this, we introduce the explainable performance (XPER) methodology to decompose a performance metric (e.g., area under the curve (AUC), [Formula: see text]) into specific contributions associated with the various features of a forecasting model. XPER is theoretically grounded on Shapley values and is both model-agnostic and performance metric-agnostic. Furthermore, it can be implemented either at the model level or at the individual level. Using a novel data set of car loans, we decompose the AUC of a machine-learning model trained to forecast the default probability of loan applicants. We show that a small number of features can explain a surprisingly large part of the model performance. Notably, the features that contribute the most to the predictive performance of the model may not be the ones that contribute the most to individual forecasts (Shapley additive explanation). Finally, we show how XPER can be used to deal with heterogeneity issues and improve performance. This paper was accepted by Kay Giesecke, finance. Funding: The authors thank the Institut Universitaire de France, the Autorité de contrôle prudentiel et de résolution Chair in Regulation and Systemic Risk, the HEC-Deloitte Chair on Artificial Intelligence for Business Innovation, the Excellence Initiative of Aix-Marseille University [A*MIDEX], and the French National Research Agency [Grants AMSE ANR-17-EURE-0020, Ecodec ANR-11-LABX-0047, and MLEforRisk ANR-21-CE26-0007] for supporting our research. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02025 .
title_cn: 测量预测性能的驱动因素：在信用评分中的应用
abstract_cn: 由于信用评分模型在决定信贷获取方面扮演着越来越重要的角色，因此受到银行监管机构和内部模型验证者的日益关注。这些机构需要监控模型的性能并识别其关键驱动因素。为此，我们引入了可解释性能（XPER）方法论，以将性能指标（例如曲线下面积（AUC），[公式：见文本]）分解为与预测模型的各种特征相关的具体贡献。XPER 理论上基于沙普利值，且对模型和性能指标均不敏感。此外，它可以在模型层面或个体层面实施。利用一组新颖的汽车贷款数据集，我们分解了一个机器学习模型的 AUC，该模型旨在预测贷款申请人的违约概率。我们展示了少数特征能够解释模型性能的惊人大部分。值得注意的是，对模型预测性能贡献最大的特征可能并不是对个体预测贡献最大的特征（沙普利加性解释）。最后，我们展示了如何利用 XPER 处理异质性问题并提高性能。本文已被凯·吉塞克（Kay Giesecke）接受，领域为金融。资助：作者感谢法国大学研究所、审慎监管与系统风险主席、HEC-德勤商业创新人工智能主席、艾克斯-马赛大学卓越计划 [A*MIDEX] 以及法国国家研究署 [资助编号 AMSE ANR-17-EURE-0020、Ecodec ANR-11-LABX-0047 和 MLEforRisk ANR-21-CE26-0007] 对我们研究的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02025 获取。

title: Firm-Level Litigation Risk: Measurement and Effects
abstract: Firms are exposed to litigation risk from various stakeholders, including investors, customers, and regulators, and prior research has shown that such risk shapes a range of corporate policies. In this study, we develop a simple and transparent measure of firm-level litigation risk by parsing SEC 10-K annual reports. This measure demonstrates strong predictability for lawsuits, even after controlling for firm characteristics, existing lawsuits, geographic factors, and various fixed effects, including firm fixed effects. This simple measure performs comparably to a more resource-intensive, AI-generated litigation risk measure. We further link our measure of litigation risk to a variety of corporate policies, including cash holdings, capital expenditures, R&D, and acquisitions, uncovering results consistent with the literature. This paper was accepted by Bo Becker, finance. Funding: C. Ham acknowledges financial support from the Blanche “Peg” Philpott Faculty Fellowship. Supplemental Material: The internet appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05821 .
title_cn: 公司层面的诉讼风险：测量与影响
abstract_cn: 企业面临来自各种利益相关者的诉讼风险，包括投资者、客户和监管机构，先前的研究表明，这种风险影响了一系列企业政策。在本研究中，我们通过解析SEC 10-K年报，开发了一种简单透明的公司层面诉讼风险测量指标。该指标在控制公司特征、现有诉讼、地理因素以及各种固定效应（包括公司固定效应）后，仍显示出对诉讼的强预测能力。这个简单的测量指标的表现与一种更为资源密集的、由人工智能生成的诉讼风险测量指标相当。我们进一步将诉讼风险的测量与多种企业政策联系起来，包括现金持有、资本支出、研发和收购，揭示出与文献一致的结果。本文已被Bo Becker（金融学）接受。资助：C. Ham感谢Blanche “Peg” Philpott教职基金的财务支持。补充材料：互联网附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05821获取。

title: Executive Cooperativeness: Evidence from Conference Calls
abstract: Cooperativeness is essential to individual and organizational success. We exploit a unique feature of conference calls to study individual executives’ cooperativeness, indicated by their directly inviting colleagues to respond to analysts’ questions, and its relation with their career outcomes and firm performance. After validating our measure, we find that cooperativeness is associated with relevant executive characteristics. Older, more senior, and more experienced executives are more likely to display cooperativeness. We also find that cooperativeness persists but can be influenced by colleagues. Turning to the relation with career and firm outcomes, we find robust evidence of a positive association between cooperativeness and the likelihood of being promoted to chief executive officer (CEO). Appointing CEOs who are more cooperative than their predecessors is associated with an average three-day abnormal return of 0.6% around the announcement of the appointment. This paper was accepted by Ranjani Krishnan, accounting. Funding: W. Cai gratefully acknowledges financial support from the Bernstein Center for Leadership and Ethics of Columbia Business School. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05902 .
title_cn: 高管合作性：来自电话会议的证据
abstract_cn: 合作精神对个人和组织的成功至关重要。我们利用会议电话的独特特征来研究个别高管的合作精神，这通过他们直接邀请同事回应分析师的问题来体现，并探讨其与职业发展和公司业绩的关系。在验证我们的测量方法后，我们发现合作精神与相关的高管特征相关。年龄较大、职位更高、经验更丰富的高管更可能表现出合作精神。我们还发现，合作精神是持久的，但可以受到同事的影响。关于职业和公司结果的关系，我们发现合作精神与晋升为首席执行官（CEO）的可能性之间存在显著的正相关关系。任命比其前任更具合作精神的CEO，与任命公告时平均三天的异常回报率为0.6%相关。本文由兰贾尼·克里希南（Ranjani Krishnan）接受，属于会计领域。资助：蔡伟（W. Cai）衷心感谢哥伦比亚商学院伯恩斯坦领导与伦理中心的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05902获取。

title: Dual Sourcing in an Assembly System: A Simple and Effective Critical-Set Base-Surge Policy
abstract: Coordinating Dual-Sourcing for Multi-Component Assembly Systems Assembly manufacturers are increasingly relying on dual sourcing—pairing a low-cost regular supplier with a faster but more expensive express option—to enhance supply chain resilience. Yet although dual sourcing is well understood for single items, managing it across multiple components in an assembly system has remained largely unresolved. In the paper, we introduce a novel Critical-Set Base-Surge (CSBS) policy, which combines a constant order policy for regular sources to meet base demand with a Critical-Set (CS) policy for express sources to handle surge demand. By revealing a weaker form of additive separability and proving exponential state convergence under CSBS, we provide a performance bound and establish asymptotic optimality as regular lead times grow. Numerical experiments show that, compared to benchmark policies that apply the Tailored Base-Surge policy, the CSBS policy achieves substantial optimality gap reductions. Furthermore, we propose a CSBS policy with easy-to-compute parameters and demonstrate that it delivers performance comparable with the CSBS policy.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 组装系统中的双重采购：一种简单有效的关键集基础突发政策
abstract_cn: 协调多组件装配系统的双重采购 装配制造商越来越依赖双重采购——将低成本的常规供应商与更快但更昂贵的快递选项配对，以增强供应链的韧性。然而，尽管双重采购在单一物品的管理上已经得到充分理解，但在装配系统中跨多个组件进行管理仍然基本未得到解决。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的关键集基础激增（CSBS）政策，该政策结合了对常规来源的恒定订单政策以满足基本需求，以及对快递来源的关键集（CS）政策以应对激增需求。通过揭示一种较弱形式的可加分离性并证明在CSBS下的指数状态收敛，我们提供了性能界限并确立了常规交货时间增长时的渐近最优性。数值实验表明，与应用定制基础激增政策的基准政策相比，CSBS政策在最优性差距上实现了显著减少。此外，我们提出了一种具有易于计算参数的CSBS政策，并证明其性能与CSBS政策相当。

title: EXPRESS: Far Apart, Slower Together: Employee Geographic Distance and Project Delay in Global New Product Development
abstract: Geographic dispersion is routine in new product development, yet it remains unclear whether employee geographic distance (EGD) slows project execution. We develop a coordination costs perspective in which employee geographic distance (EGD) is postulated to increase project delays because it raises attention allocation and information search costs. We test this framework by using a longitudinal employee–project–month panel from a large manufacturing firm that spans 9,729 observations across Europe, North America, and Asia. We find that greater geographic distance is associated with longer project delays, and that the effect is contingent on employee and project characteristics. The EGD–delay link is attenuated by employee familiarity and project similarity, consistent with lower attention allocation costs, and for specialist employees, consistent with differences in information search costs. We also find that the link is amplified for cross-functional geographic dispersion. Additional analyses document that the association between EGD and project delay is concentrated at later project gates and in high-risk or highly innovative projects. A difference-in-differences test around daylight-saving-time transitions indicates that temporal misalignment alone does not account for the EGD–delay relationship. Taken together, the results inform the literature on new product development, project management, and global work by demonstrating when geographic distance is most consequential for project delay.
title_cn: 表达：相距遥远，缓慢前行：员工地理距离与全球新产品开发中的项目延迟
abstract_cn: 地理分散在新产品开发中是常见现象，但员工地理距离（EGD）是否会延缓项目执行仍不明确。我们提出了一种协调成本的视角，假设员工地理距离（EGD）会增加项目延误，因为它提高了注意力分配和信息搜索成本。我们通过使用来自一家大型制造公司的纵向员工-项目-月份面板数据进行测试，该数据涵盖了欧洲、北美和亚洲的9,729个观察值。我们的研究发现，较大的地理距离与较长的项目延误相关，并且这种影响依赖于员工和项目的特征。EGD与延误之间的联系受到员工熟悉度和项目相似度的削弱，这与较低的注意力分配成本一致；而对于专业员工，则与信息搜索成本的差异一致。我们还发现，对于跨职能的地理分散，这种联系得到了增强。额外分析表明，EGD与项目延误之间的关联主要集中在项目的后期阶段，以及在高风险或高度创新的项目中。围绕夏令时转换进行的差异中的差异测试表明，单独的时间错位并不能解释EGD与延误之间的关系。综合来看，这些结果为新产品开发、项目管理和全球工作文献提供了重要信息，表明地理距离在何种情况下对项目延误最为重要。

title: EXPRESS: Research Opportunities in Wildfire Management from an Operations Management Perspective
abstract: Wildfires—also known as wildland fires, bushfires, and forest fires—are large-scale, uncontrolled fires that occur in vegetated areas, triggered by natural or human causes. They have significant economic, environmental, and social impacts. As with most disasters, the location, timing, and magnitude of wildfires are unpredictable. Wildfire management (WFM) has a long history in forestry research; however, it remains relatively underexplored by Operations Management (OM) researchers, partly due to the specialized knowledge required. We propose a macro-level framework to review the existing WFM literature and identify four key areas for future research: Risk Assessment, Fuel Treatment, Surveillance and Detection, and Initial Attack and Suppression. We also examine techniques for managing these functions and present cross-tabulations to map research coverage. This work enables OM researchers to identify research opportunities that align with their interests in WFM functions and their expertise in specific methodologies. We highlight research gaps and outline opportunities for empirical and analytical contributions, including predictive and prescriptive analytics. Practitioners will also benefit from discussing WFM functions to address real-world challenges.
title_cn: 表达：从运营管理的角度看野火管理的研究机会
abstract_cn: 野火——也称为野外火灾、灌木火灾和森林火灾——是在植被区域发生的大规模失控火灾，通常由自然或人为因素引发。它们对经济、环境和社会产生显著影响。与大多数灾害一样，野火的发生地点、时间和规模都是不可预测的。野火管理（WFM）在林业研究中有着悠久的历史；然而，由于所需的专业知识，WFM在运营管理（OM）研究中仍然相对未被充分探讨。我们提出了一个宏观层面的框架，以回顾现有的WFM文献，并确定未来研究的四个关键领域：风险评估、燃料处理、监测与检测，以及初期攻击与扑灭。我们还考察了管理这些职能的技术，并呈现交叉表以映射研究覆盖情况。这项工作使OM研究人员能够识别与他们在WFM职能中的兴趣和特定方法论的专业知识相一致的研究机会。我们强调了研究空白，并概述了实证和分析贡献的机会，包括预测性和规范性分析。实践者也将受益于讨论WFM职能，以应对现实世界中的挑战。

title: EXPRESS: Channel Management in Outpatient Care: Implications of Telemedicine and Transportation Support
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic accelerated telemedicine adoption, offering a convenient alternative to in-person care. However, televisits may not fully address health concerns and sometimes require supplementary in-person visits, consuming resources that could have been saved if the initial visit had been in-person. As the pandemic subsides, in-person visits are regaining popularity, prompting providers to reorient resources toward in-person care. Transportation support (or subsidies) for patients, funded by providers or the government, plays a critical role in facilitating in-person visits. In this evolving landscape of telemedicine, we study how an outpatient care provider can optimally balance virtual and in-person services and whether, and how, to engage with transportation subsidies. We connect these two questions by examining how transportation subsidies reshape the provider’s optimal capacity allocation across service channels and, in turn, affect overall patient access. We develop a stylized queueing-game model to represent the operations of a revenue-maximizing provider serving patients who strategically choose between service channels. We find that provider size, measured by total capacity relative to demand, is key. Small and large providers perform best by focusing on one channel without offering subsidies, whereas medium-sized providers benefit from carefully balancing both channels alongside subsidies. Paradoxically, transportation subsidies, which make in-person care more accessible, may reduce overall patient access to care, even when fully funded by the government. This occurs because providers may shift capacity toward a higherreimbursement channel, ultimately serving fewer patients. Differentiating payment rates between in-person and virtual visits can potentially prevent such reductions. Our study highlights the importance of capacity coordination between channels for providers and cautions policymakers that transportation support may unintentionally harm patient access. Properly designed financial incentives can help prevent such negative outcomes.
title_cn: 表达：门诊护理中的渠道管理：远程医疗和交通支持的影响
abstract_cn: COVID-19疫情加速了远程医疗的普及，为面对面就医提供了一个便捷的替代方案。然而，远程就诊可能无法完全解决健康问题，有时需要补充的面对面就诊，这消耗了本可以在初次就诊时节省的资源。随着疫情的缓解，面对面就诊重新受到欢迎，促使医疗提供者重新调整资源以支持面对面护理。由提供者或政府资助的患者交通支持（或补贴）在促进面对面就诊中发挥着关键作用。在这一不断发展的远程医疗环境中，我们研究了门诊护理提供者如何在虚拟服务和面对面服务之间实现最佳平衡，以及是否以及如何与交通补贴进行互动。我们通过考察交通补贴如何重塑提供者在服务渠道之间的最佳容量分配，从而影响整体患者的就医可及性，将这两个问题联系起来。我们开发了一个简化的排队博弈模型，以表示一个以收入最大化为目标的提供者的运营，该提供者为战略性选择服务渠道的患者提供服务。我们的研究发现，提供者的规模（以总容量相对于需求来衡量）是关键。小型和大型提供者通过专注于一个渠道而不提供补贴来获得最佳表现，而中型提供者则通过在两个渠道之间进行仔细平衡并提供补贴来获益。矛盾的是，交通补贴虽然使面对面护理更易获得，但可能会减少整体患者的就医可及性，即使这些补贴完全由政府资助。这是因为提供者可能会将容量转向报销更高的渠道，最终服务的患者数量减少。区分面对面和虚拟就诊的支付率可能有助于防止这种减少。我们的研究强调了提供者在渠道之间进行容量协调的重要性，并提醒政策制定者，交通支持可能会无意中损害患者的就医可及性。合理设计的财务激励可以帮助防止此类负面结果。

title: EXPRESS: Navigating Traceability: How Pricing and Responsibility Sharing Impact Quality and Welfare
abstract: As consumer demand for transparency and accountability in product sourcing grows, traceability-enabled technologies are increasingly adopted across supply chains. This paper explores the diverse impacts of traceability on product quality and supply chain welfare, particularly on pricing and responsibility sharing among stakeholders. We develop a multi-agent game-theoretic model to investigate how effective traceability systems are in enhancing product quality and supply chain members’ welfare.We find that traceability operates as a double-edged sword: it does not always improve quality or benefit all parties, and its effectiveness depends critically on how pricing power and responsibility for quality failures are allocated between the buyer and suppliers. Under buyer pricing, traceability raises quality and benefits the buyer when quality improvement is cost-efficient, whereas it benefits suppliers when quality improvement is costly. Under supplier pricing, traceability always benefits suppliers, but it improves quality only when responsibility is exogenously set or when quality improvement is cost-efficient, and it benefits the buyer only when responsibility is endogenously chosen or when quality improvement is cost-efficient. These findings provide important managerial implications for practitioners and offer guidance for policymakers and firms in designing traceability systems that enhance product quality and overall supply chain welfare.
title_cn: 表达：追踪性导航：定价和责任分担如何影响质量与福利
abstract_cn: 随着消费者对产品来源透明度和问责制的需求不断增长，具备可追溯性的技术在供应链中得到了越来越广泛的应用。本文探讨了可追溯性对产品质量和供应链福利的多重影响，特别是在定价和利益责任分配方面。我们构建了一个多主体博弈理论模型，以研究有效的可追溯性系统在提升产品质量和供应链成员福利方面的作用。研究发现，可追溯性是一把双刃剑：它并不总是提高质量或惠及所有相关方，其有效性在很大程度上取决于买方与供应商之间定价权和质量失效责任的分配。在买方定价的情况下，当质量提升具有成本效益时，可追溯性提高了质量并使买方受益，而当质量提升成本高昂时，则使供应商受益。在供应商定价的情况下，可追溯性始终使供应商受益，但仅在责任被外生设定或质量提升具有成本效益时才会提高质量，而只有在责任内生选择或质量提升具有成本效益时，买方才会受益。这些发现为从业者提供了重要的管理启示，并为政策制定者和企业在设计能够提升产品质量和整体供应链福利的可追溯性系统时提供了指导。

title: Less Is Not Always More: The Impact of Social Media Block Intensity and Immediacy on Work Time
abstract: Social media use during work hours is a persistent concern for workplace productivity. Many current blocking policies are designed under the assumption that greater restriction will always produce better outcomes. However, our four-week randomized field experiment with 217 U.S. participants challenges this assumption. We compared different blocker designs along two dimensions: the degree of control (partial versus complete blocking) and the immediacy of implementation (gradual versus immediate rollout). The results show that complete blocking can backfire, reducing time spent working, whereas partial blocking increases it. In addition, gradually introducing restrictions proved more effective than imposing them immediately, particularly during periods when users historically engaged more with social media. Assuming a typical eight-hour workday, complete blocking corresponds to an estimated loss of about 20.3 productive workdays per year, whereas partial blocking is associated with a gain of roughly 6.2 productive workdays annually. Partial blocking also increased the duration of uninterrupted work sessions, indicating improved sustained focus. These findings suggest a clear implication for practice and policy; rather than adopting all-or-nothing bans, organizations, app developers, and policymakers should implement calibrated, adaptive, and phased controls that reduce distractions without triggering behavioral backlash.
topics: Personal Information Management and User Behavior
title_cn: 少即是不总是多：社交媒体屏蔽强度和即时性对工作时间的影响
abstract_cn: 在工作时间使用社交媒体一直是影响工作效率的一个持续关注点。许多现行的屏蔽政策是基于这样一种假设：更严格的限制总会产生更好的结果。然而，我们对217名美国参与者进行的为期四周的随机实地实验挑战了这一假设。我们比较了不同屏蔽设计的两个维度：控制程度（部分屏蔽与完全屏蔽）和实施的紧迫性（逐步实施与立即实施）。结果显示，完全屏蔽可能适得其反，减少了工作时间，而部分屏蔽则增加了工作时间。此外，逐步引入限制比立即施加限制更为有效，特别是在用户历史上更频繁使用社交媒体的时期。假设一个典型的八小时工作日，完全屏蔽对应的年生产力损失约为20.3个工作日，而部分屏蔽则与每年大约6.2个工作日的生产力提升相关联。部分屏蔽还增加了不间断工作时段的持续时间，表明注意力得到了改善。这些发现对实践和政策有明确的启示；组织、应用开发者和政策制定者应实施经过调整、适应性强和分阶段的控制措施，以减少干扰而不引发行为反弹，而不是采取全有或全无的禁令。

title: When Vulnerability Drives Action: Designing Forward-Looking Frameworks for Disaster Preparedness
abstract: Disaster preparedness policies depend on vulnerability indices to guide disaster management. Yet, commonly used tools such as the CDC Social Vulnerability Index and FEMA’s National Risk Index rely largely on static demographic proxies, producing broad vulnerability scores that offer limited insight into the specific needs communities will face during disasters. These approaches can obscure how hazards translate into different forms of harm, such as medical needs during power outages or housing repair needs after storms, and risk embedding structural bias into preparedness decisions. This research shows that vulnerability can be reframed as directly predicting disaster-related needs. We develop the Local Impact Vulnerability Assessment (LIVA), a framework that integrates demographic, housing, socioeconomic, and health indicators with historical disaster outcomes to estimate hazard-specific community needs. Using data from federally declared disasters between 2018 and 2025, LIVA demonstrates substantially stronger alignment with observed FEMA assistance needs across hazards and need categories than existing vulnerability and risk indices. The findings suggest that disaster preparedness policy should advance beyond static indices to tailored predictive planning tools that anticipate how different hazards generate different community needs. By identifying where specific forms of assistance are likely to be required, emergency management organizations can plan, prepare, and improve the equity and effectiveness of disaster response.
title_cn: 当脆弱性驱动行动：为灾害准备设计前瞻性框架
abstract_cn: 灾害准备政策依赖于脆弱性指数来指导灾害管理。然而，常用的工具，如CDC社会脆弱性指数和FEMA国家风险指数，主要依赖静态的人口统计代理，生成的广泛脆弱性评分对社区在灾害期间面临的具体需求提供的洞察有限。这些方法可能掩盖了危害如何转化为不同形式的伤害，例如停电期间的医疗需求或风暴后的住房修复需求，并可能在准备决策中嵌入结构性偏见。本研究表明，脆弱性可以重新构建为直接预测与灾害相关的需求。我们开发了地方影响脆弱性评估（LIVA），这是一个将人口、住房、社会经济和健康指标与历史灾害结果相结合的框架，用于估算特定危害的社区需求。利用2018年至2025年间联邦宣布的灾害数据，LIVA在不同危害和需求类别的观察到的FEMA援助需求方面显示出与现有脆弱性和风险指数相比，具有显著更强的对齐性。研究结果表明，灾害准备政策应超越静态指数，转向量身定制的预测规划工具，以预见不同危害如何产生不同的社区需求。通过识别特定形式的援助可能需要的地方，紧急管理组织可以进行规划、准备，并提高灾害响应的公平性和有效性。

title: Beyond coal: When can outsider stakeholders drive transformative change?
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Organizations grant stakeholders who provide valuable resources insider status in governance, excluding less valuable outsiders. Firms thereby assemble a value‐maximizing resource portfolio but face challenges when environmental shifts require adaptation that harms some insiders. We combine and extend new stakeholder and social movement theories, hypothesizing how various stakeholders influence such adaptation. Outsiders can enable adaptation depending on organizational governance and the array of insider stakeholders. For‐profit firms are less open to outsider influence, but a wider array of insiders enables outsiders to align with certain groups to overcome the opposition of others who resist change. The nature of these alignments shapes whether adaptation involves transformative divestments or exploratory investments. We test our theory in the context of the Beyond Coal movement to divest coal plants. Managerial Summary To gain access to valuable resources, organizations commit to stakeholders who provide these resources. However, this creates problems when adapting to changes in the environment that undermine the value of these resources. How can managers balance their stakeholder commitments with the need to integrate the concerns of other stakeholders demanding adaptive changes? We find that organizational governance and the configuration of stakeholder interests can create openings for adaptation. Studying a period of rapid environmental change in the US electric utility industry, for‐profit utilities were more likely to retire coal generators when activists aligned with consumer advocates, and more likely to invest in solar generators when activists aligned with prosumers.
title_cn: 超越煤炭：外部利益相关者何时能够推动变革性变化？
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 组织在治理中赋予提供有价值资源的利益相关者内部人地位，排除价值较低的外部人。因此，企业组建了一个最大化价值的资源组合，但在环境变化需要适应时，可能会面临挑战，这种适应可能会损害某些内部人的利益。我们结合并扩展了新的利益相关者理论和社会运动理论，假设不同的利益相关者如何影响这种适应。外部人能够促进适应，这取决于组织治理和内部利益相关者的构成。营利性企业对外部影响的开放程度较低，但更多样化的内部人使外部人能够与某些群体对齐，以克服其他抵制变革的群体的反对。这些对齐的性质决定了适应是否涉及变革性的剥离或探索性的投资。我们在“超越煤炭”运动的背景下测试了我们的理论，该运动旨在剥离煤电厂。 管理总结 为了获取有价值的资源，组织承诺于提供这些资源的利益相关者。然而，当适应环境变化时，这可能会导致问题，环境变化可能削弱这些资源的价值。管理者如何平衡对利益相关者的承诺与整合其他要求适应性变革的利益相关者的关切之间的关系？我们的研究发现，组织治理和利益相关者利益的配置可以为适应创造机会。在研究美国电力公用事业行业快速环境变化的时期时，营利性公用事业公司在活动家与消费者倡导者对齐时更可能退役煤电机组，而在活动家与生产者对齐时更可能投资于太阳能发电机。

title: Algorithmic Facial Expression Analysis: A Novel Methodology to Advance Management Research on Emotions
abstract: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence technologies, algorithmic facial expression analysis (AFEA) has emerged as a promising methodology to measure emotions. Despite rapid adoption across management subfields, however, the full scope of AFEA’s theoretical potential remains underexplored. This paper provides a framework that links the AFEA measurement innovation to major opportunities for theoretical advancement around emotions in organizations. We start by describing the methodological basis of AFEA and reviewing its applications in management research to date. We then outline two core capabilities of AFEA—namely, capturing the temporal structure of emotions and detecting inauthentic expressions of emotions—and illustrate how these capabilities can enable theory advancement in management research. After presenting an empirical demonstration of AFEA’s capabilities and a practical step-by-step guide for using it, we conclude by discussing key considerations for realizing the future potential of AFEA research.
title_cn: 算法面部表情分析：推动情感管理研究的新方法论
abstract_cn: 随着人工智能技术的快速发展，算法面部表情分析（AFEA）作为一种有前景的方法论，已被广泛应用于情感测量。然而，尽管在管理学的各个子领域迅速被采纳，AFEA的理论潜力仍未得到充分探索。本文提供了一个框架，将AFEA测量创新与组织中情感理论发展的主要机会联系起来。我们首先描述了AFEA的方法基础，并回顾了其在管理研究中的应用。接着，我们概述了AFEA的两个核心能力——捕捉情感的时间结构和检测不真实的情感表达，并说明这些能力如何促进管理研究中的理论进步。在展示AFEA能力的实证示例和使用的逐步实用指南后，我们最后讨论了实现AFEA研究未来潜力的关键考虑因素。

title: Time the Surge: Theorizing and Examining Team Pacing in Multiple-Membership Contexts
abstract: Pacing has long been critical for understanding team work patterns. As organizations increasingly embrace multiple memberships, with workers engaged in different concurrent projects, it becomes important to understand how team pacing is uniquely shaped in such contexts. Extending beyond prior theories with single-membership assumptions, we theorize a new perspective on how team pacing is influenced by multiple memberships—contexts typically characterized by non-coinciding project portfolios across members. Based on this theorizing, we examined a large-scale dataset comprising over 1.6 million entries of project activities involving 1,712 individuals across 415 team projects, and found that higher average multiple memberships among core members delayed the timing of a project’s activity surge. This surge-delaying effect was mitigated, however, when project members shared greater external project overlap. An additional experiment revealed that the reduced perceived feasibility of holistic optimization was an important psychological mechanism underlying the surge-delaying effect. Furthermore, we found that projects with longer time spans were less likely to experience a surge, but for those that did, surge timing had implications for efficiency: projects with either a markedly early surge (i.e., initial phase) or a markedly late surge (i.e., final phase) exhibited greater temporal procedural efficiency than those with an intermediate-phase surge.
topics: Personal Information Management and User Behavior
title_cn: 时间的冲击：在多重成员背景下理论化与考察团队节奏
abstract_cn: 节奏一直是理解团队工作模式的重要因素。随着组织越来越多地接受多重成员身份，员工参与不同的并行项目，理解团队节奏在这种背景下如何独特地形成变得尤为重要。超越以单一成员身份假设为基础的先前理论，我们提出了一种新的视角，探讨多重成员身份如何影响团队节奏——这种情境通常以成员之间项目组合的不重合为特征。基于这一理论，我们分析了一个大规模数据集，该数据集包含超过160万条项目活动记录，涉及1712名个人和415个团队项目。研究发现，核心成员之间的平均多重成员身份越高，项目活动高峰的时间就越晚。然而，当项目成员之间共享较大的外部项目重叠时，这种延迟效应会减弱。额外的实验揭示，整体优化的感知可行性降低是导致延迟效应的重要心理机制。此外，我们发现，时间跨度较长的项目不太可能经历活动高峰，但对于那些经历高峰的项目而言，高峰时机对效率有影响：无论是明显早期的高峰（即初始阶段）还是明显晚期的高峰（即最终阶段），其时间程序效率均高于经历中期高峰的项目。

title: The power of lore: how occupational myths help precarious workers endure
abstract: Drawing on 55 interviews with professional opera singers, we consider the role that occupational myths play in helping the precariously employed make sense of their work and sustain their commitment to it. We advance our theoretical understanding in this area in two distinct ways. First, by theorizing occupational myths as a powerful social device that helps to rescript the intelligibility of precarious work, along with normative responses to it. Second, by grounding myths’ utility in their capacity to counteract precarity’s tendency to constrain workers’ temporal horizons. In the context of research showing that precarity locks workers into the anxious present, we show how myths push time horizons back out again, ultimately in sustaining ways. Through these contributions, we add new pieces to the increasingly complex theoretical puzzle of how and why people endure precarious work.
title_cn: 传说的力量：职业神话如何帮助不稳定的工人坚持下去
abstract_cn: 通过对55位职业歌剧歌手的访谈，我们探讨了职业神话在帮助处于不稳定就业状态的工作者理解其工作的意义以及维持对工作的承诺方面所发挥的作用。我们在这一领域的理论理解主要体现在两个方面。首先，我们将职业神话理论化为一种强大的社会工具，帮助重新构建不稳定工作的可理解性及其规范性反应。其次，我们将神话的效用建立在其抵消不稳定性对工人时间视野限制倾向的能力上。在研究表明不稳定性使工人陷入焦虑的当下这一背景下，我们展示了神话如何将时间视野重新延展，从而在持续的方式中维持工人的承诺。通过这些贡献，我们为日益复杂的理论拼图增添了新的元素，以探讨人们为何以及如何忍受不稳定工作的原因。

title: Health Shocks and Annuity Choices
abstract: This study examines how a first-time malignant cancer diagnosis, acting as an informational shock to perceived longevity, affects the demand for life annuities. Using a quasi-experimental design and exploiting Swedish administrative data, we show that receiving a cancer diagnosis close to retirement reduces annuitization rates by 5.5%. The diagnosis lowers the money’s worth ratio of a life annuity by 33%, representing a substantial financial loss. Combined with the modest behavioral response, this yields a low demand elasticity of 0.17 with respect to the perceived annuity value. Evidence from a complementary laboratory experiment indicates that this limited adjustment is driven by the influence of a default option that reduces responsiveness to private health information and may disadvantage individuals in poor health. This paper was accepted by Camelia Kuhnen, finance. Funding: This work was supported by The Henry Crown Institute of Business Research in Israel [Grant 08923100], the Israel Science Foundation [Grant 1637/23], the Jeremy Coller Foundation [Grant 0612017581], the Hamrin Foundation [Grant 2023-09], the Solomon Lew Center for Consumer Behavior [Grant 08923200], the Swedish Research Council for Health Working Life and Welfare [Grant 2023-00046], and the Center for Agriculture, Environment and Natural Resource [Grant 0004]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.00682 .
title_cn: 健康冲击与年金选择
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了首次恶性癌症诊断作为对预期寿命的认知冲击，如何影响人们对终身年金的需求。通过采用准实验设计并利用瑞典的行政数据，我们发现，临近退休时收到癌症诊断会使年金化率降低5.5%。该诊断使终身年金的货币价值比率降低33%，代表了显著的财务损失。结合适度的行为反应，这导致对感知年金价值的需求弹性低至0.17。来自补充实验室实验的证据表明，这种有限的调整是由于默认选项的影响，降低了对私人健康信息的反应能力，可能使健康状况较差的个体处于不利地位。本文已被Camelia Kuhnen接受，属于金融领域。资助信息：本研究得到了以色列亨利·克朗商业研究所[资助编号08923100]、以色列科学基金[资助编号1637/23]、杰里米·科勒基金会[资助编号0612017581]、哈姆林基金会[资助编号2023-09]、所罗门·刘消费者行为中心[资助编号08923200]、瑞典健康、工作生活与福利研究委员会[资助编号2023-00046]以及农业、环境与自然资源中心[资助编号0004]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.00682获取。

title: Forecasting GDP Growth Rates Using Accounting Earnings: A Large Panel Microdata Approach
abstract: Economists and econometricians typically use aggregate economic and financial variables for gross domestic product (GDP) prediction. However, aggregation often results in a loss of valuable information, diminishing key features such as heterogeneity, interactions, nonlinearity, and structural breaks. We propose a novel microforecasting approach, using large panel data of firm accounting earnings from corporate financial reports to forecast GDP. By employing machine learning methods, we can effectively exploit this large microlevel information set to achieve substantially more accurate GDP forecasts. Our findings highlight the advantages and potential of utilizing microlevel data for macroprediction, diverging from the conventional macroforecasting paradigm that relies on aggregate data to forecast macrovariables. This paper was accepted by Will Cong for the Special Issue on Digital Finance. Funding: Y. Hong is supported by the MOE Social Sciences Innovative Group on Complex Systems Modeling in Economic Management in the Era of Digital Intelligence, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences [Grant E5820801] and the National Science Foundation of China (NSFC) Basic Science Center Project “Econometric Modeling and Economic Policy Studies” [Grant 71988101]. N. Huang is supported by the NSFC [Grant 72473166]. Y. Wang is supported by the Shenzhen Municipal Government, National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 20220810114654001]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.01549 .
title_cn: 利用会计收益预测GDP增长率：一种大规模面板微观数据方法
abstract_cn: 经济学家和计量经济学家通常使用宏观经济和金融变量来预测国内生产总值（GDP）。然而，聚合往往导致有价值信息的丧失，削弱了异质性、互动性、非线性和结构性断裂等关键特征。我们提出了一种新颖的微观预测方法，利用来自企业财务报告的大型面板数据来预测GDP。通过采用机器学习方法，我们能够有效利用这一庞大的微观信息集，从而实现更为准确的GDP预测。我们的研究结果突显了利用微观数据进行宏观预测的优势和潜力，偏离了传统依赖聚合数据预测宏观变量的宏观预测范式。本文已被Will Cong接受，作为数字金融特刊的一部分。资助信息：Y. Hong获得了中国科学院大学数字智能时代经济管理复杂系统建模教育部社会科学创新团队的支持[资助号E5820801]，以及中国国家自然科学基金（NSFC）基础科学中心项目“计量经济建模与经济政策研究”的支持[资助号71988101]。N. Huang获得了NSFC的支持[资助号72473166]。Y. Wang获得了深圳市政府和中国国家自然科学基金[资助号20220810114654001]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.01549获取。

title: Preservation of Multimodularity: New Results and Applications
abstract: Preserving Multimodular Structure in Substitution Models Substitution is common in operations problems, where one product or resource may be used to satisfy demand intended for another. In models with multiple resources and demand classes, this flexibility makes it harder to establish structural properties of optimal dynamic decisions. In “Preservation of Multimodularity: New Results and Applications,” Tong Wang, Li Xiao, and Fen Xu develop two new preservation results for multimodularity, a key property for deriving monotonicity and bounded sensitivity of optimal decisions. The first applies to one-way substitution, such as upgrading, and the second extends to two-way substitution under suitable cost and priority conditions. A central insight is that when allocation priorities are determined by marginal cost or value inequalities, both multimodularity and these inequalities are preserved after optimization. Applications include dynamic capacity management, remanufacturing inventory systems with lost sales, buyer-item matching on resale platforms, and multilocation transshipment.
title_cn: 多模态性保存：新结果与应用
abstract_cn:
在替代模型中保持多模结构

替代在运营问题中很常见，其中一种产品或资源可以用来满足原本针对另一种产品的需求。在具有多种资源和需求类别的模型中，这种灵活性使得建立最佳动态决策的结构特性变得更加困难。在《多模结构的保持：新结果与应用》一文中，王通、肖莉和徐芬提出了两个关于多模结构的新保持结果，这一关键特性对于推导最佳决策的单调性和有界敏感性至关重要。第一个结果适用于单向替代，例如升级，第二个结果则在适当的成本和优先级条件下扩展到双向替代。一个核心见解是，当分配优先级由边际成本或价值不等式决定时，优化后多模结构及这些不等式都得以保持。应用领域包括动态容量管理、具有失销的再制造库存系统、转售平台上的买家-物品匹配以及多地点转运。

title: Optimal Inventory Allocation for Indifferent Goods Under Dynamic Substitution
abstract: A New Structural Insight into Stockout-Based Substitution Stockout-based substitution creates complex stochastic dynamics in inventory systems even in highly symmetric settings. In this paper, Zhou, Wang, and Zhang examine a canonical setting in which a firm allocates a fixed inventory across multiple perfectly substitutable product types (e.g., colors or designs) and customers purchase uniformly from available options. Despite the model’s symmetry, the induced stochastic dynamics are subtle and resist classical convexity or induction-based arguments. The authors introduce a continuous-time embedding of the discrete sales process, converting inventory depletion times into independent Erlang random variables. This probabilistic reformulation enables an exact characterization of marginal values and yields a clean structural result: the optimal allocation is balanced. Beyond solving the symmetric case, the method extends naturally to finite-horizon MNL models, offering new analytical insight into fluid relaxations and dynamic substitution.
title_cn: 动态替代下无差异商品的最优库存分配
abstract_cn:
基于缺货的替代的新结构性洞察

基于缺货的替代在库存系统中即使在高度对称的环境下也会产生复杂的随机动态。在本文中，周、王和张研究了一个典型的情境，其中一家公司在多个完全可替代的产品类型（例如颜色或设计）之间分配固定的库存，而客户则从可用选项中均匀购买。尽管模型具有对称性，但所引发的随机动态却是微妙的，并且抵抗经典的凸性或归纳法论证。作者引入了离散销售过程的连续时间嵌入，将库存耗尽时间转换为独立的厄朗随机变量。这种概率重构使得边际价值的精确表征成为可能，并得出了一个清晰的结构性结果：最优分配是平衡的。除了求解对称案例外，该方法自然地扩展到有限时间范围的多项式选择模型（MNL），为流体松弛和动态替代提供了新的分析视角。

title: Where the Ball Starts Rolling? An Empirical Investigation into Initial Opinion Formation on Social Media Platforms
abstract: Social media users routinely encounter unfamiliar, high-stakes information and form impressions that shape what they believe, share, and act on. This article shows that these first impressions can stabilize after only a small, bounded run of consistent exposure, creating an early “sufficiency” point after which additional posts add little. Once this early stance forms, it guides downstream engagement: users are more receptive to information that aligns with their initial view and less responsive to information that challenges it. Importantly for practice and policy, early judgments are often weakly tied to factual accuracy under low-effort scrolling, making it difficult for later corrections to fully reverse the effects of early exposure. The study also demonstrates that source cues matter: professional titles and affiliations can outweigh visible platform signals such as badges and popularity metrics when people evaluate unfamiliar content. Together, these findings suggest that platforms and regulators should prioritize upstream interventions—verifying expertise claims before allowing professional titles to be displayed, strengthening domain-specific credibility signals, and ensuring authoritative information reaches users early in exposure sequences—especially in sensitive areas such as health, finance, and public safety.
title_cn: 球何时开始滚动？社交媒体平台上初始意见形成的实证研究
abstract_cn: 社交媒体用户经常会接触到不熟悉的、高风险的信息，并形成影响他们信念、分享和行动的印象。本文表明，这些初步印象在仅经过一小段有限的持续接触后就可以稳定下来，形成一个早期的“足够”点，此后额外的帖子几乎不会增加影响。一旦形成这种早期立场，它就会指导后续的参与：用户对与其初始观点一致的信息更为接受，而对挑战其观点的信息反应较弱。对于实践和政策而言，重要的是，早期判断往往与事实准确性之间的联系较弱，尤其是在低努力的滚动浏览中，这使得后来的纠正措施难以完全逆转早期接触的影响。研究还表明，信息来源的线索至关重要：在评估不熟悉内容时，专业头衔和隶属关系可能会超越可见的平台信号，如徽章和受欢迎程度指标。综合这些发现，建议平台和监管机构应优先考虑上游干预措施——在允许展示专业头衔之前验证专业资格，增强特定领域的可信度信号，并确保权威信息在接触序列的早期就能到达用户——尤其是在健康、金融和公共安全等敏感领域。

title: Newborn Gender and Technology Adoption Among Rural Entrepreneurs in Ethiopian Family Firms
abstract: This paper investigates how the gender composition of potential heirs influences technology adoption decisions in family-owned agricultural microenterprises. Drawing on primary field data from three waves of panel surveys of 734 rural households in Ethiopia (2013–2019), we exploit the exogenous microshock of a newborn child’s gender to isolate its causal impact on farmers’ uptake of new technologies. We find that the arrival of a son—rather than a daughter—significantly increases the likelihood of adopting agricultural innovations. Additional analyses suggest that this heterogeneity is driven primarily by a combination of gendered social and succession norms that prioritize men over women in agricultural leadership together with parents’ rational expectations about sons’ future involvement in the family business. Our findings contribute to research on entrepreneurship and development by identifying family structure—specifically, heirs’ gender—as a novel determinant of technology adoption. More broadly, by situating the analysis within the family-firm paradigm, we argue that these dynamics extend beyond low-income settings; in many developing and advanced economies, gender biases in succession norms may systematically shape strategic investment decisions and long-term business sustainability. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19985 .
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚家庭企业中农村企业家的新生儿性别与技术采纳关系
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了潜在继承人的性别构成如何影响家族经营农业微型企业的技术采纳决策。基于对埃塞俄比亚734个农村家庭在2013年至2019年间进行的三轮面板调查的初步实地数据，我们利用新生儿性别的外生微冲击来隔离其对农民采纳新技术的因果影响。研究发现，儿子的出生显著提高了农业创新的采纳可能性，而女儿的出生则没有这种影响。进一步分析表明，这种异质性主要源于性别化的社会和继承规范，这些规范在农业领导中优先考虑男性，以及父母对儿子未来参与家庭企业的理性预期。我们的研究为创业和发展领域的研究做出了贡献，识别出家庭结构——特别是继承人的性别——作为技术采纳的新决定因素。更广泛地说，通过将分析置于家族企业范式中，我们认为这些动态超越了低收入环境；在许多发展中和发达经济体中，继承规范中的性别偏见可能系统性地影响战略投资决策和长期商业可持续性。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19985 获取。

title: Social Support and Employee Mental Health: A Meta-Synthesis and Theoretical Framework
abstract: Social support is widely promoted as a key organizational response to employee mental health challenges, yet management research has often overlooked how different sources of support—such as coworkers, line managers, senior leadership, and professional service providers—vary in their effects on employee recovery. This oversight is especially consequential for employees managing common, diagnosable mental health conditions for whom recovery depends on changes in maladaptive cognitive and behavioral processes that are frequently activated in work contexts. To address this limitation, we conducted an interdisciplinary meta-synthesis of 96 review articles spanning management, clinical psychology, psychiatry, and occupational health. Anchored in Beck and Haigh’s Generic Cognitive Model, we develop the Integrated Work Support Model (IWSM), which explains how distinct sources of social support influence activating work situations, maladaptive beliefs, and maladaptive behaviors over time for employees with common mental health conditions. Our synthesis distinguishes the roles of primary, secondary, and tertiary interventions, clarifying when organizational actors can mitigate triggering work conditions, when clinical expertise from professional service providers is required to directly change maladaptive processes, and how social support from actors internal to the organization can enhance—but not substitute for—therapeutic intervention. By integrating clinical theory with management scholarship, this review advances a process-based understanding of social support, specifies role-differentiated responsibilities for organizational actors and professional service providers, and offers actionable guidance for designing social support systems that promote recovery while avoiding unintended harm.
title_cn: 社会支持与员工心理健康：元综合与理论框架
abstract_cn: 社会支持被广泛视为应对员工心理健康挑战的关键组织响应，然而管理研究往往忽视了不同支持来源（如同事、直接经理、高层领导和专业服务提供者）在员工恢复过程中的不同影响。这一忽视对那些管理常见可诊断心理健康问题的员工尤其重要，因为他们的恢复依赖于在工作环境中经常被激活的适应不良的认知和行为过程的改变。为了解决这一局限性，我们进行了跨学科的元综合，分析了96篇涵盖管理、临床心理学、精神病学和职业健康的综述文章。基于贝克和海赫的通用认知模型，我们提出了综合工作支持模型（IWSM），该模型解释了不同来源的社会支持如何影响工作情境的激活、适应不良的信念和适应不良的行为，尤其是对于那些有常见心理健康问题的员工。我们的综合分析区分了初级、次级和三级干预的角色，明确了组织参与者何时可以减轻触发工作条件，何时需要专业服务提供者的临床专业知识来直接改变适应不良的过程，以及组织内部参与者的社会支持如何增强——但不能替代——治疗干预。通过将临床理论与管理学术结合，这一综述推动了对社会支持的过程导向理解，明确了组织参与者和专业服务提供者的角色差异化责任，并提供了设计促进恢复的社会支持系统的可操作性指导，以避免意外的伤害。
